feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to find user exit for for "On save" of MIR4?
entry.content:
I'm trying to map the UUID into CFDI.

My process is MIR4>Input UUID field>then save. After saving the UUID must be mapped in CFDI. 

What user exit should i edit for this?

entry.title: I cant figute out how to set custom error messages for input fields in FPM
entry.content:
The Programm below is from SAP and im not able to debug how they are able to get the custom Message and mark the Input field as an Error.

I thought that you might have to do something in the Get-Definition of the Field Name but thats not the Case

or is this Response not even custom but a generic one just based on the type used for the input field having a certain range

entry.title: Special characters is causing width issues with ALV
entry.content:
Hi, I have a custom program that creates an ABAP list in the background/foreground. When viewed in foreground, the ALV has not width issues. But when it is created in background, it has issues.

Please check the description rows of line # 1, 3, 4. It is not aligned with the column header Description because it has special characters

entry.title: CVI between BP and Customer (In ECC 6 SP5)
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a requirement to integrate custom ZZ-fields between Customer and BP (and BP to Customer).
I have Z field in customer which need to be update to standard field in BP and vice versa the same field need to be update from BP to Customer.

Be attention we are working on ECC 6 SP 5 (which mean old version).
I already read the blog  https://blogs.sap.com/2019/11/07/sap-s-4hana-business-partner-field-enhancement/
but it is not suitable to my system.
The CVI_CUSTOM_MAPPER already created.
Any suggestion how to solve this requirement?

Best Regards,
Itzik

entry.title: ADT: Report Texts for Function Modules fail
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm trying to open report texts of a function module, specifically for the user exit, include, ZXWO1U03.

The report texts are located in report SAPLXWO1 and I've edited them in SAP-Gui, SE38, beforehand. 

Now, I would like to open them in ADT and compare all available texts with a second SAP system to synchronize them.

However, the Quick Assist as well opening the texts, in general, fail. Quick Assist crashes anyway and opening the report text from the project explorer opens the object, however, the content is empty!

Is my approach wrong or is it a general bug in ADT.

My ADT version is current as are all (SAP) plugins. The backend is a SAP 7.57 (2022) on-premise S/4.

The current lines of the text elements are, maybe ADT crashes because of some < > characters?

entry.title: Result of recording(QM) column grey out in QA02
entry.content:
Hi All,

I need help in enhancing Result of recording(QM) in QA02, I need to grey out result field in general tab based conditions, if condition satisfies then result column field should be greyed out. 
in my requirement we a re maintaining  user in a custom table, if the user is maintained in the table then field should be greyed out.
please help me with this.

 

Thank & regards,

Namdev

entry.title: Eclipse ADT installation error
entry.content:
when installing ADT using below.

https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

I am getting error -


Software being installed: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

Missing requirement: ABAP Communication Framework 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 3.44.0) requires 'org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; org.eclipse.emf.workspace.feature.group [1.7.0,2.0.0), greedy=false' but it could not be found

I have tried with Network - Direct, Native option also.

Any solution to this.

entry.title: Modify address partner in sales order
entry.content:
Good morning Experts I am trying to make a change for the partners at header level and for this I am trying to use the BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE and SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CHANGE but I can't make the change for the Transport Zone. I don't know what I am doing wrong. Here are some screenshots.

Thank you for your help

entry.title: UPDATE statement delete rows
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm a beginner in ABAP and I'm facing an issue while working with a copy of the SBOOK table. We've created a new table by copying SBOOK, but when I try to update a record to change the passenger name by using UPDATE statement the entire row gets deleted instead of just updating the field.

Could anyone help me understand why this might be happening and how to resolve it.

Thanks in advance. 

Kind Regards

entry.title: A standard function module is overwriting my logic in GGB1.
entry.content:
I have a specific value of a certain field in BSEG in GGB1 when the document is saved. However, the function module is overwriting the values of that BSEG field. How do I override that function module?

I am having trouble finding the userexit for saving  FB01

entry.title: ABAP CDS View Case Statement and Join Condition
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm new to CDS View, Can someone help me with the below logics

If PERSNUMBER is null in BUT000, get the ADDRNUMBER from BUT020 and pass to ADR6 for email address - this one in join condition

If email address entry is only one assign that, If multiple email addresses found, pick where ADR6-FLGDEFAULT is 'X' 

Thanks in Advance !!

entry.title: Resend SDS(Safety data sheet)
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement, at present SDS(safety data sheet) is automatically send to respective vendor once it is generated, requirement is that can we resend safety datasheet again without generating new one. is there any API/FM available for this. I tried FM CVEQ_RDO_SEND_TO_INTERNET but it is not working as expected.

please share your ideas 

Thank

entry.title: Need Inputs on how to download data into excel from an internal table
entry.content:
Hello,

Need inputs on below requirement:

I would like to move data into excel of an internal table which has a field that stores long text with multiple lines separated by '#' (cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline). I would like to replace "#' with some character so that it will add that entry in a new line in the downloaded excel.

Please find the below use case:

say, I have data in internal table it_tab1 with work area ls_tab1.

Now, this lstab1-<field> = string1 #string2 #string3

Now, I want input of the field in the downloaded excel as below:

string1

string2

string3

Please provide possible solutions.

Note: I have used below statement still not able to get data as expected.

REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF '#' IN lstab1-<field> WITH cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline.

and I am using SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING FM to convert string to xstring.

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Merge PDF of type TLINE
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have one requirement in which I have to merge multiple PDF's. The problem is that I am getting these PDF from spool. I have used the FM "CONVERT_ABAPSPOOLJOB_2_PDF " to get the spool request in a table with type TLINE. Now again I want to fetch another spool request and merge both the files in one PDF file.

I am unable to merge these files.

Even if I concatenate all it_pdf in byte mode. I am getting the last PDF only but not the whole or complete merged PDF.

Please help me with it.

entry.title: How do I modify a field of BSEG in FB01? Substitution on GGB1 and BTE does not work.
entry.content:
I'm having trouble on setting a specific value on BSEG-FDTAG in FB01.

My logic in GGB1 and BTE is 

BSEG-FDTAG = '20241212'.

But it doesn't seem to take effect. I can't also find a userexit for FB01 on save

entry.title: ABAP Debugger: organize the screen
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I've a question concerning the ABAP Debugger and how to organize the screen: when I go in debug, the proposed screen is like this:

left side, the source code is shown

right side, I've two panels, on the top one there is the 'ABAP and Screen Stack', on the bottom panel the 'Variables' list

 

now, I would like to have the top right panel simply removed, having only the variables one;

 

Do you have any idea how the settings shall be set to obtain this?

 

Thanks and bye,

Jepy F

entry.title: Smartforms print next pages no Items complete the windows
entry.content:
Hi! 

I created a Smartform with a 'MAIN' window for 5 items and if there are 6 items it goes to another page.
However, it is going to the next page with 2 items.
Could you tell me what the error is?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: How do I debug an ALV that was processed in the background?
entry.content:
I have custom program that can generate an ALV in foreground. It can also generate an ALV in background that can viewed in SM37.

I have an issue with the column optimization when the ALV is processed or viewed in SM37.

As seen in the picture below, the column "Description" is not aligned from top to bottom. 

Is the custom program also responsible for the construction of the ALV in SM37? While the ALV columns does not have problems when processed in foreground, I have debugged it and to construct the ALV in foreground, it uses the FM REUSE_ALV_BLOCK_LIST_APPEND.

entry.title: A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER"
entry.content:
Below is my code to define a class. When I activate it, it has error message : A class already exists with the name "LCL_CUSTOM_HEADER". And I can see there are two class with same name in the function group. Why?

CLASS lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
      INHERITING FROM cl_foreign_application_view_mm.
  PUBLIC SECTION.

    METHODS: constructor
                  IMPORTING im_dynpro         TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_prog           TYPE sy-repid
                            im_priority       TYPE i OPTIONAL
                            im_foreign_prog   TYPE sy-repid
                            im_foreign_dynpro TYPE sy-dynnr
                            im_metafield      TYPE mmpur_metafield.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
    METHODS: build_dynpro_fields  REDEFINITION.
    METHODS: transport_from_model REDEFINITION.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: custom_metafield TYPE mmpur_metafield.
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header DEFINITION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*       CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
*
*----------------------------------------------------------------------*
CLASS lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD constructor.

    CALL METHOD super->constructor
      EXPORTING
        im_dynpro         = im_dynpro
        im_prog           = im_prog
        im_priority       = im_priority
        im_foreign_prog   = im_foreign_prog
        im_foreign_dynpro = im_foreign_dynpro.
    custom_metafield = im_metafield.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "CONSTRUCTOR
  METHOD build_dynpro_fields.
    DATA: l_dynpro_entry LIKE LINE OF my_dynpro_fields.
    l_dynpro_entry-metafield = custom_metafield.
    INSERT l_dynpro_entry INTO TABLE my_dynpro_fields.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "BUILD_DYNPRO_FIELDS
  METHOD transport_from_model.
    foreign_application_ok = mmpur_yes.

*    set model to function group
    processed_model = my_model.
  ENDMETHOD.                    "transport_from_model
ENDCLASS.                    "lcl_custom_header IMPLEMENTATION

entry.title: The method ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expr
entry.content:
When I activate the code, it shows  The method "ZZGET_NEXT_SUBVIEW_COUNT" does not have a RETURNING parameter. It cannot be called in expressions. The coding as following:

    CALL METHOD uo_model_holder->add
      EXPORTING
        im_screen_view = lo_custom_view
        im_position    = uo_model_holder->zzget_next_subview_count( ).

May I know what is wrong with the coding? Thanks in advance.
